textByHash.2fd0ae77ef343e4c1288c88d443f6311a67e188e: Nilsal, traveller. I was injured while exploring down here. Could you spare me some cooked fish, meat or vegetables?
textByHash.2d7da49531c1cc3d55660765a6b51abae1dbe820: Oh, please hand it over if you can spare it.
textByHash.b93ea35ef5ab9714e897cf5bb63ce92fb04aedd6: Oh, well if you return with any I would greatly appreciate it.
textByHash.92f4243352f51dbc71eaca4248d1e6dbd2752ef3: No thanks. I would rather eat fish, meat or vegetables.
textByHash.ce7517fa7a4746aff8bbdbd6ec3c13b1c013f957: Thanks for helping me. Is there anything you'd like to know about this temple? If you find anything in here, show it to me and I'll tell you what I know about it.
textByHash.90566ec1d0e9e31a173248b91319a7f5bdf9a6b9: This place probably had a name at some point but it has long since been forgotten. The Arceuus librarians refer to this place as the Forthos Dungeon.
textByHash.18c6e921d5c14ccc802c2e612f285744429e680d: It is rumoured that this place used to be of religious significance to druidic followers of both Ralos and Ranul.
textByHash.8c4419056001aab65fc6a06dcb7eb59bee0b13ac: According to religious texts, Ralos is the god of the sun and Ranul, his brother, is the god of the moon.
textByHash.83252e9447a99830216e9d02301e68c7f68a1a15: If you find any artifacts or relics from within this temple, I would be very interested in seeing them.
textByHash.06150290981983c438eb0a293ea0699f2a97511e: You need only to look up and see their greatness above you when you return to the surface.
textByHash.1cb96e08000bb0af39766f9877bbcd877ec4581c: My name is Brother Aimeri, I am a travelling monk from the distant land of Varlamore on a journey to uncover the secrets of this temple.
textByHash.09a36a3ac672c2b7fecb68652f0d412741b9cafc: I worship Ralos, a common practice where I am from. However, I found out that our order may have originated from this temple. If you find anything of interest, please let me know.
textByHash.4f418cf7de26c8249df939d4b56c2c302ce92c3b: You have my gratitude. Any information you do find would also be of interest to the Arceuus Library. I hope we can uncover the secrets of this place for the greater good.
textByHash.b00341e9ca2bf0d60e6d573b999f30c2a265d5e4: I found out about this place from Logosia in the Arceuus Library. I came to investigate but was ambushed by the spiders in the room to the north.
textByHash.24484cb1fa473ec1bd75135d3bc480a5533ae329: I'm a scholar not a fighter. I didn't have time to think through my options so I did what came naturally and ran away.
textByHash.74537e4b70d4f08a0dc79b0022b6b3d860ac3e68: See, the problem with that... Is that it is an excellent idea I wish I had thought of at the time.
textByHash.0c145104f308f5665c4f9313ed63b2e3e0fd6c3f: How strange. Tell me, what did the creature look like?
textByHash.9ed2a0dd41aa690eeea76a00a8c726bbbeb9aa7a: Let me see... According to my notes that appears to have been a Shaeded Beast, a vile creature which posseses people and corrupts their minds.
textByHash.6b18bd5a1788826466eb43cf887416cfdbeffa7c: Only the power of Ralos can remove such a curse. I suggest making an offering to Ralos somewhere within this temple.
textByHash.722f442baabcf9d2a63810c1f2adac538840688a: As Ralos is the sun god, any normal bone just won't do. I'd recommend the bones of any dragon.
textByHash.6ac74c0ae2b7a4b731cc643bbbc9eac468b97f9c: I'd advise staying away from the altar in the mean time.
textByHash.48cb6fe14e5d48576162e6ac88875bc0be133822: The great Ralos foresaw this and presented me with the same key for safe-keeping should you lose it.
textByHash.1f426c98f1934d7068fa97afe54a0d35741645bd: That's some fine spider silk you have there. I can take it off you in exchange for a grubby key.
textByHash.cd31f0d60ddfdbece47356765575ac68ae8baca8: Disgusting! I don't know why you have that, I'd destroy them before they have a chance to hatch.
textByHash.0212b2223ca9569686666261b530b63f928092e1: Do with it as you wish, just don't come crawling back to me if it comes back to bite you.
textByHash.7c663b9205a1cfd0bde604af39a3b7691708d101: Hmm, interesting. I recall seeing a chest to the west of here further down the passage with colouring similar to this key. Perhaps this key opens that chest?
textByHash.94dce371c99002351e81f7a6e69aa3b74b7fb79e: My, you adventurer's are a strange bunch. I suppose there is a reason why you have kept the creatures eyes in a jar?
textByHash.4a773ec345bf8ed7a8c668cf6bc19a1634b89c53: As I said, you are a strange bunch indeed.
textByHash.c10ff0e9a929cbec231e24c4099cd4e913ec8c1e: That looks like the legs of Sarachnis, bound together by her web. I suppose if anything, it looks heavy enough to crush your enemies.
textByHash.534a115e8009e12a0642befc47575716dc179d01: Do as you wish. I've certainly seen people keep worse company than a spider.
textByHash.8027b8d16f3663b247583b6e23ab58182278532e: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a religious script which speaks of Ranul.
textByHash.5d9ec37514a1f077ca910c5d1a40399bbd915749: This is very sad. To see such religious scripts desecrated, it's blasphemy!
textByHash.e45cf45f8ec6fc92d4b344fb773405d15c279f91: Yes, yes! I hope so. I would expect a temple of this nature to have a library of sorts within it. Maybe the original is somewhere within it.
textByHash.9a52762bdd8869bff20e3b6e7bdd3043068bfa31: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a religious script which speaks of Ralos.
textByHash.81239843355adf8ae5b80a734bc825808945fd07: Oh, very interesting. This page appears to be taken from a historical script about the temple itself.
textByHash.61ab2b7da26f292dd9e2145e428d65f69461b2af: This is very sad. To see such information desecrated in this way.
textByHash.a7ea26a4af4adc1c3080fafd99c5dc9ea8e72abf: No! Keep that away from me! I can sense an ominous power coming from that coin. Where did you find it?
textByHash.ae236a7fb12647b756ee629f4d0e02cd5dd5cd72: I'd find out where it came from and put it back immediately.
textByHash.a9d2428e5a65b54420ebf76140d4846e1ab10d4f: The markings on it resemble that of the cult of Ranul, I'd look around for something of religious significance to them.
textByHash.8660214be081e34488836bc00318574d38896417: Fascinating. I'm not quite sure what this is for, perhaps there are doors within the temple which this unlocks?
textByHash.579767ef86707d6c70b054b49697ac656ffa776b: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the religion of Ranul.
textByHash.2f6d33fb626f496866b91b84f0a69ac3c8a27f07: Oh, it appears that there are some pages missing from it. The missing information could prove valuable.
textByHash.cffee042d97b562af942ac409659c2e4295d207f: This Temple has been abandoned for some time. Maybe the creatures within have destroyed the tome while looking for food. You may have to kill them to recover the pages.
textByHash.355e1d05065e2e2b4d015c364d2b17d5c3e0369c: The book seems to be intact! I'm sure Logosia in the Arceuus Library to the north would find this information valuable.
textByHash.61971a928780ca1288f5290075efafdc7c7361ce: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the religion of Ralos.
textByHash.8ac1d79f4518e2bc2b73acaeb96aaaeb8ce92322: Amazing! This is exactly what I was looking for. This tome contains information about the temple itself.
textByHash.b553e75624b363a778b32514bf3d79629378f2e7: I'm afraid I don't know anything about that item.
